title: Grox's Villagers
description: This mod adds some funny villager features inspired by Grox's videos.
body:
This mod introduces hilarious new behaviors and mechanics to the villagers in your world, heavily inspired by Grox's videos!

Features:

 Regular Villagers:

New Hurt Sounds: When a regular villager takes damage, they will now let out a completely new, custom scream.

Crying Mechanic: After getting hurt, regular villagers will enter a temporary "crying" state, walking around and sobbing.

 The Dumb Villager:

A New Mob: The Dumb Villager has a 7.5% chance to spawn naturally in place of a regular villager. It features a custom, funny appearance and its own unique ambient and hurt sounds.

Duct Tape: A brand new craftable item! You can use Duct Tape on a Dumb Villager to tape its mouth shut and silence its noises. You can safely remove the tape at any time by right-clicking them with Shears.

Messy Accidents: The Dumb Villager has a small, random chance to "make a mess" (soil itself) while wandering around.

Feeding Mechanic: You can feed the Dumb Villager any type of food item. Once it eats, it will have a messy accident exactly 5 seconds later!

Bath Time: If a Dumb Villager gets dirty, you can easily clean them up by right-clicking them with a Water Bucket.

Note: I do not claim ownership of some of the audio/visual assets. This is a fan-made project created for the community to replicate a little bit of the Grox experience.
